title: Flea Treatment in Orange, NJ | Professional Flea Control $350-$650
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Orange, NJ. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for $350-$650 service!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in Orange, New Jersey? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive flea treatment services to eliminate fleas from your home or business quickly and effectively. Our experienced technicians serve all of Orange, from the historic Victorian homes near Main Street to modern apartments throughout the city.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Orange and the surrounding areas with safe, effective flea treatments. Our licensed technicians use proven methods and pet-safe products to ensure your home is flea-free, backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Orange's mix of historic homes, multi-family residences, and proximity to parks like Orange Park creates ideal conditions for flea problems, especially in warmer months. Our team understands the unique pest control challenges facing Orange homeowners and renters, from the tree-lined neighborhoods near Valley Road to apartment buildings in the downtown area.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Orange, NJ?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Orange range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically occurs within 2-3 weeks as the treatment cycle addresses adult fleas, larvae, and eggs. We often recommend a follow-up treatment for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are dry, after which they can safely return to normal activities.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my home before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend vacuuming all carpets and furniture thoroughly, washing pet bedding in hot water, and temporarily relocating pets during treatment. Our team will provide you with a complete preparation checklist when you schedule your Orange flea treatment service.
